title: MovementRoutinePayload
description: Constraint payload emitted by the movement_arts engine (#463) and consumed by the playlist-builder audio-dynamic bridge (#475). Defines per-block BPM, energy, and kinetic-texture requirements so the bridge can select and align tracks.

routine_id.description: Unique identifier for this routine (UUID or slug).

style.description: Movement style / domain (e.g. hip-hop, vinyasa, ballet, tai-chi).

bpm_global.description: Optional global default BPM (overridden by per-block bpm_target).

source_engine.description: Identifier of the movement engine that produced this payload.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the payload was generated.

bpm_range.description: [min_bpm, max_bpm] inclusive range. Defaults to bpm_target ±10.

energy.description: Target energy level (0=minimal, 1=maximum). Used as a secondary ranking signal alongside BPM.

kinetic_texture.description: Movement quality for this block. Single texture (e.g. 'staccato') or composite joined by '+' (e.g. 'fluid+grounded'). See KINETIC_TEXTURE_MAP.md for valid values.

peak_count_s.description: Seconds into the block when the choreographic peak occurs. Used by sonic_anchor.py to align audio drop/peak timestamps.

notes.description: Optional human-readable notes for this block.
